Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: identify recurring activities Verify Documents appears multiple times in same case with different context and Call Customer appears multiple times with different purposes

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Adjust Account appears across cases but only once per case so it does not require contextual renaming under the task focus on repeated activities within the same case

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Verify Documents changes meaning by position and context from initial verification to re check after additional documents or after account adjustment

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Call Customer changes meaning by associated context such as requesting missing documents clarifying discrepancy confirming adjustments or asking customer to return

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: rename Verify Documents as Initial Document Verification and Re Verification after Additional Docs or Post Adjustment Document Re Verification

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: rename Call Customer as Call Customer Missing Docs Request Call Customer Clarify Discrepancy Call Customer Confirm Adjustments and Call Customer Recall Walk in

Name: Validation - PE
Text: only Verify Documents and Call Customer need renaming while Initiate Request and Approve Request occur once per case and remain unchanged

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: present revised log with renamed activities and provide brief justification based on contextual clues from timestamps sequence resources and additional context
